name: High Contrast Pro
author: Claude Themes Community
description: Maximum-contrast accessibility preset: pure-black background, pure-white text, and AAA-grade accent colors. Fully derives every Claude Code token (including the user-message background) so no hardcoded UI colors leak through and the white user-input highlight is replaced by a readable surface.
